rows.reason_or_contract: 404 debug_disabled or route-specific network diagnostic error
404 operator_poh_disabled unless WEALL_ENABLE_OPERATOR_POH=true; 403 operator_token_required/operator_token_invalid unless X-WeAll-Operator-Token matches; standard_api_error_envelope for bad request
standard_api_error_envelope; 404 relay_disabled; 400 invalid relay ack; 403 unauthorized relay ack
standard_api_error_envelope; operator token/observer edge route-specific failures

truth_boundary: The exact uploaded v2.0 First Draft PDF is retained and hash-bound. Its extracted full-scope registers control W1 human-machine equality. Structural compiler coverage does not prove runtime correctness, independent review, interoperability, capacity, or production activation.
